name: tuned-tensor
description: Codex plugin for fine-tuning and locally serving Tuned Tensor behaviour-spec models.

interface.shortDescription: Build and operate Tuned Tensor behaviour specs.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex use focused tt CLI workflows to fine-tune Tuned Tensor behaviour-spec models and serve completed models locally through an OpenAI-compatible API.
defaultPrompt: Fine-tune a Tuned Tensor model from this behaviour spec.
Serve this Tuned Tensor model locally on port 8000.
Inspect my Tuned Tensor run report and summarize regressions.
